disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus Outbreak Should Formally End On July 2: WHO - NDTV
updates.body_en: Hantavirus Outbreak Should Formally End On July 2: WHO NDTV
updates.summary_zh: WHO 宣布汉坦病毒疫情将于7月2日正式结束。

updates.title_en: US ends its hantavirus response as quarantines expire and threat wanes - The Independent
updates.body_en: US ends its hantavirus response as quarantines expire and threat wanes The Independent
updates.summary_zh: 美国结束汉坦病毒应急响应，隔离期满，威胁减弱。

updates.title_en: CDC Concludes Hantavirus Outbreak Response on Cruise Ship - Devdiscourse
updates.body_en: CDC Concludes Hantavirus Outbreak Response on Cruise Ship Devdiscourse
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 结束邮轮汉坦病毒疫情响应。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus self-isolation complete for 34 Canadians, Health Canada says - National - Global News
updates.body_en: Hantavirus self-isolation complete for 34 Canadians, Health Canada says - National Global News
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大卫生部称34名加拿大人完成汉坦病毒自我隔离。

updates.title_en: Exclusive | CDC Ends Hantavirus Response as U.S. Outbreak Risk Diminishes - WSJ
updates.body_en: Exclusive | CDC Ends Hantavirus Response as U.S. Outbreak Risk Diminishes WSJ CDC ends US hantavirus response The Hill Hantavirus quarantine ends for Americans held for six weeks in Nebraska The Guardian
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 结束汉坦病毒响应，内布拉斯加州隔离解除。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus quarantined patients released from isolation after 42 days - WTHR
updates.body_en: Hantavirus quarantined patients released from isolation after 42 days WTHR
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒隔离患者42天后获释。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus quarantine ends; no cases in the US - WPXI
updates.body_en: Hantavirus quarantine ends; no cases in the US WPXI
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒隔离结束，美国无病例。

updates.title_en: CDC ends US hantavirus response - The Hill
updates.body_en: CDC ends US hantavirus response The Hill
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 结束汉坦病毒疫情响应。

updates.title_en: Person from MN is exposed to hantavirus, officials say risk is low to general public - Voice of Alexandria
updates.body_en: Person from MN is exposed to hantavirus, officials say risk is low to general public Voice of Alexandria
updates.summary_zh: 明尼苏达州一人接触汉坦病毒，官方称公众风险低。

updates.title_en: WHO says hantavirus outbreak to be declared over by July 2 if no new cases emerge - Anadolu Ajansı
updates.body_en: WHO says hantavirus outbreak to be declared over by July 2 if no new cases emerge Anadolu Ajansı
updates.summary_zh: WHO 称若再无新病例，汉坦病毒疫情将于 7 月 2 日宣布结束。

updates.title_en: CDC Officially Ends Hantavirus Response as Outbreak Risk Recedes - AJMC
updates.body_en: CDC Officially Ends Hantavirus Response as Outbreak Risk Recedes AJMC
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 正式结束汉坦病毒响应，疫情风险消退。

updates.body_en: US CDC to end hantavirus response, WSJ reports The Mighty 790 KFGO
